notable_excerpts: We have always tried to optimize our costs, like be it green chemistry or be it actively -- proactively planning our materials.
Reinforcing our position as a trusted partner for complex, high-value and sustainable chemistry solutions.
Our on-going investments in backward integration and capacity expansions have started yielding results.
We reached out to more than 27,000 students across 137 schools in Telangana and Andhra Pradesh.
We are promoting education by providing better amenities, nutritious food and drinking water in these schools.
Conducting regular health camps and offering scholarships to meritorious students to make quality education accessible to everyone.
We continue to take a proactive approach to risk management.
We have strengthened supplier diversification and maintained a strategic inventory buffer.
Our robust logistics strategies and operational agility position us well to meet evolving customer needs.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Divi's Laboratories' efforts in sustainable chemistry and backward integration, significant community engagement through education and health initiatives, and proactive governance practices in risk management and logistics. However, environmental disclosures were less specific compared to social and governance aspects.
